heading: PROCEEDINGS BY COPYRIGHT ROYALTY JUDGES
label: 8 PROCEEDINGS BY COPYRIGHT ROYALTY JUDGES
notes: Prior ProvisionsThis chapter consisted of sections 801 to 803, related to proceedings by copyright arbitration royalty panels, prior to being amended generally by .Pub. L. 108–419
